functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { return((base == EPWM1_BASE)); }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(phaseCount < 0x1000000U); // // Write to TBPHS:TBPHSHR bits // HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_TBPHS) = phaseCount << 8U; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrPhaseCount < 256U); // // Write to TBPHSHR bits // HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_TBPHS) = hrPhaseCount << 8U; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(periodCount < 0x1000000U); // // Write to TBPRD:TBPRDHR bits // HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_TBPRDHR) = periodCount << 8U; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrPeriodCount < 256U); // // Write to TBPRDHR bits // HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_TBPRDHR) = hrPeriodCount << 8U; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Read from TBPRD:TBPRDHR bit // return(HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_TBPRDHR) >> 8U); }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Read from TBPRDHR bit // return(HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_TBPRDHR) >> 8U); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the edge mode // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) & ~(0x3U << (uint16_t)channel )) | ((uint16_t)mepEdgeMode << (uint16_t)channel)); EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the MEP control // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) & ~(0x1U << ((uint16_t)channel + 2U))) | ((uint16_t)mepCtrlMode << ((uint16_t)channel + 2U))); EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the CMPAHR or CMPBHR load mode // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) & ~(0x3U << ((uint16_t)channel + 3U))) | ((uint16_t)loadEvent << ((uint16_t)channel + 3U))); EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set output swap mode // EALLOW; if(enableOutputSwap) { HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) |= HRPWM_HRCNFG_SWAPAB; } else { HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) &= ~HRPWM_HRCNFG_SWAPAB; } EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the output on ePWM B // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) & ~(HRPWM_HRCNFG_SELOUTB)) | ((uint16_t)outputOnB << 5U)); EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Enable MEP automatic scale // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) |= HRPWM_HRCNFG_AUTOCONV; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Disable MEP automatic scale // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG) &= ~HRPWM_HRCNFG_AUTOCONV; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set HRPE bit // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRPCTL) |= HRPWM_HRPCTL_HRPE; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear HRPE bit // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRPCTL) &= ~HRPWM_HRPCTL_HRPE; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set TBPHSHRLOADE bit // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRPCTL) |= HRPWM_HRPCTL_TBPHSHRLOADE; EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear TBPHSHRLOADE bit // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRPCTL) &= ~HRPWM_HRPCTL_TBPHSHRLOADE; EDIS; }

{ // // Set the PWMSYNC source // EALLOW; // // Configuration for sync pulse source equal to HRPWM_PWMSYNC_SOURCE_PERIOD // or HRPWM_PWMSYNC_SOURCE_ZERO // if(syncPulseSource < HRPWM_PWMSYNC_SOURCE_COMPC_UP) { HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRPCTL) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRPCTL) & ~(HRPWM_HRPCTL_PWMSYNCSELX_M | HRPWM_HRPCTL_PWMSYNCSEL)) | ((uint16_t)syncPulseSource << 1U)); } else { HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRPCTL) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRPCTL) & ~HRPWM_HRPCTL_PWMSYNCSELX_M) | ((uint16_t)syncPulseSource << HRPWM_HRPCTL_PWMSYNCSELX_S)); } EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(trremVal < 2048U); // // Set Translator Remainder value // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_TRREM) = (trremVal & HRPWM_TRREM_TRREM_M); EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(compCount < 0x1000000U); // // Write to counter compare registers // if(compModule == HRPWM_COUNTER_COMPARE_A) { // // Write to CMPA:CMPAHR // HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_CMPA) = compCount << 8U; } else { // // Write to CMPB:CMPBHR // HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_CMPB) = compCount << 8U; } }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrCompCount < 256U); // // Write to the high resolution counter compare registers // if(compModule == HRPWM_COUNTER_COMPARE_A) { // // Write to CMPAHR // HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_CMPA) = hrCompCount << 8U; } else { // // Write to CMPBHR // HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_CMPB) = hrCompCount << 8U; } }

{ uint32_t compCount; // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get counter compare value for selected module // if(compModule == HRPWM_COUNTER_COMPARE_A) { // // Read from CMPAHR // compCount = HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_CMPA) >> 8U; } else { // // Read from CMPBHR // compCount = HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_CMPB) >> 8U; } return(compCount); }

{ uint16_t hrCompCount; // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get counter compare value for selected module // if(compModule == HRPWM_COUNTER_COMPARE_A) { // // Read from CMPAHR // hrCompCount = HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_CMPA) >> 8U; } else { // // Read from CMPBHR // hrCompCount = HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_CMPB) >> 8U; } return(hrCompCount); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(redCount < 0x200000U); // // Set the consolidated RED (Rising Edge Delay) count // HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_DBREDHR) = redCount << 9U; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrRedCount < 128U); // // Set the High Resolution RED (Rising Edge Delay) count only // HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_DBREDHR) = hrRedCount << 9U; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(fedCount < 0x200000U); // // Set the High Resolution FED (Falling Edge Delay) count // HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_DBFEDHR) = fedCount << 9U; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrFedCount < 128U); // // Set the high resolution FED (Falling Edge Delay) count // HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_DBFEDHR) = hrFedCount << 9U; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(mepCount < 256U); // // Set HRPWM MEP count // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRMSTEP) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRMSTEP) & ~HRPWM_HRMSTEP_HRMSTEP_M) | mepCount); EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the HRPWM DB edge mode // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG2) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG2) & ~HRPWM_HRCNFG2_EDGMODEDB_M) | ((uint16_t)mepDBEdge)); EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the HRPWM RED load mode // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG2) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG2) & ~HRPWM_HRCNFG2_CTLMODEDBRED_M) | ((uint16_t)loadEvent << HRPWM_HRCNFG2_CTLMODEDBRED_S)); EDIS; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the HRPWM FED load mode // EALLOW; HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG2) = ((HWREGH(base + HRPWM_O_HRCNFG2) & ~HRPWM_HRCNFG2_CTLMODEDBFED_M) | ((uint16_t)loadEvent << HRPWM_HRCNFG2_CTLMODEDBFED_S)); EDIS; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write the Key to EPWMLOCK register // HWREG(base + HRPWM_O_EPWMLOCK) = (0xA5A50000UL | ((uint32_t)registerGroup)); }
